message:
Apply Clippy lints to loading.rs and logs.rs

loading.rs:
- Make LoadingOverlay::stop() const

logs.rs:
- Use eq_ignore_ascii_case instead of manual lowercase comparison
- Make toggle() and matches()/enabled_count() const (pass by value for Copy type)
- Fix doc comment backtick escaping for filtered_indices
- Use map_or for timestamp extraction

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
